title: WebhookWithOptionalSigningKey
description: A webhook object that may include the signing key. The signing key is returned when a webhook is created, but omitted when an existing webhook is updated.

id.description: The unique ID of the webhook

signing_key.description: The webhook signing key, when returned by the endpoint

signing_key_set.description: Whether a signing key has been set for this webhook

created_at.description: The time the webhook was created, in epoch seconds

updated_at.description: The time the webhook was last updated, in epoch seconds
